name: No Ordnance
desc: No Ordnance selected -- are you sure?

name: Laser-Guided Anti-Air Rocket Pod
desc: Laser-guided air-to-air rocket pods with proximity warheads. For when you really want something slow dead.

name: Air-to-air Anti-Radiation Missile
desc: An aerial missile designed to destroy enemy EWO and AWACS aircraft.

name: Advanced Cruise Ballistic Missile
desc: Kinzhal. But not nuclear. I mean I guess the Kinzhal doesn't necessarily have to be nuclear. Shut up.

name: Aerial Deployed Cluster Mines
desc: Aerial deployed land-based cluster mine for seeding defensive positions.

name: Aerial Deployed Multi-Purpose Mines
desc: Aerial deployed multipurpose mine for seeding defensive positions.

name: Aerial Naval Mines
desc: Aerial deployed naval mine for seeding defensive positions.

name: Anti-Radiation Missile
desc: An early anti-radiation missile, designed to destroy SAM sites, radars, and AA guns.

name: Anti-Satellie Missile
desc: An antisatellite missile. You do know what you're doing, right?

name: Anti-Shipping Missile
desc: An antishipping missile. You're now a pirate.

name: Anti-Tank Guided Missile Racks
desc: A rack of antitank missiles, akin to those helicopters carry. Shorter ranged.

name: Integrated Electronic Warfare System, Burst
desc: IEWS with a burst-like jamming band. Offers a wider range of coverage at a more obvious signal return; useful for assisting or interrupting wingman pairs.

name: Decoy Pod
desc: A trailing decoy pod designed to soak up attention -- and thus munition hits -- over you and your allies. Deploys its jam at the start of each turn.

name: Electronic Countermeasures
desc: Electronic countermeasures designed to interfere with enemy weaponry. It could save you or an ally.

name: Electromagentic Gun Launcher
desc: It's a fucking railgun, what the hell else do you want?

name: Electronic Support Measures
desc: Electronic jamming orientated towards clearing the waves for allied weaponry. It could help you or an ally score an essential kill.

name: Fuel-Air Explosive Bomb
desc: Fuel-Air Explosive bombs coat a large area with a fuel mixture then violently detonante it, causing thermobaric damage to a large area.

name: Multi-Lock Air-to-Air Missile, Dual Launched, Incendiary
desc: Multi-lock mid.range missiles with an incendiary warhead designed to cause lingering damage to enemy airframes. Overcooking is mandatory.

name: Incendiary Semi-Active Aerial Missile
desc: Semi-Active Aerial Missile with an incendiary payload to cause lingering damage to enemy airframes. Toasty!

name: Laser-Guided Rocket Pod
desc: Laser-guided rocket pod. All the benefits of a rocket pod with more precision than a JDAM.

name: Gunpod
desc: Remove the Gunless tag.

name: High-speed Anti-Radiation Missiles
desc: An early improvement to the anti-radiation missile focused solely on more speed.

name: High-Capacity Air-to-Air Missile
desc: High Capacity Aerial Missile. These modified Fox 3 missiles have some of their payload removed to fit on multiracks.

name: High-Capacity Air-to-Ground Missile
desc: High Capacity Antiground Missile. These modified air-to-ground missiles have some of their payload removed to fit on multiracks.

name: High-Power Air-to-Air Missile
desc: High Impact Aerial Missile; these missile have a larger explosive payload.

name: High-Velocity Air-to-Air Missile
desc: High Velocity Aerial Missile; these weapons are designed to fly faster than their target's reaction time.

name: High-Velocity Air to Ground Missile
desc: High Velocity Air-to-Ground Missile; these weapons are designed to fly faster than enemy point-defense systems.

name: Integrated Electronic Warfare System
desc: An integrated electronic warfare suite put in a pod on an aircraft. Cutting-edge equipment that allows for both Electronic Support and Countermeasures.

name: Infra-Red Counter Measures
desc: Whenever IRCM is employed, you may remove a stack of Locked from an ally in your Zone

name: Joint Direct Attack Munition
desc: A JDAM kit that allows for slightly longer range. The munitions can be guided either by laser or GPS to their target, but require constant updating from a spotter

name: Joint Direct Attack Munition, Extended Range
desc: A JDAM kit that allows for slightly longer range. The munitions can be guided either by laser or GPS to their target, but require constant updating from a spotter

name: Long-range Air-to-Air Missile
desc: A long-range air-to-air missile. Useful for taking out reinforcements or bomber fleets from afar.

name: Cruise Missile
desc: Originally carried by large bombers, these air-launched cruise missiles are designed to devastate soft targets from a distance, like light infrastructure.

name: Long-range Air to Ground Missile
desc: Long Range Air-to-Ground Missiles. Designed to take out ground forces from a safe distance.

name: Long-range Anti-Shipping Missile
desc: A long range antishipping missile; these were often designed before point defenses were commonplace -- but a good pilot can still sink a carrier with a few of these bad boys.

name: Large Guided Bomb - Testing
desc: Experimental guided bomb designed to penetrate deep underground. Still in its testing phases.

name: Miniature Air-to-Air Missile
desc: The MAAM is a mini, maneuverable, and light air-to-air missile. Treat her well.

name: Miniature Standard Missiles
desc: Cute, adorable, miniature Standard Missiles. Like Maria!

name: Multi-Lock Air-to-Air Missile (2)
desc: Multilock midrange air-to-air missile. Engages two targets.

name: Multi-Lock Air-to-Air Missile (4)
desc: Multilock midrange air-to-air missile. Engages four targets.

name: Multi-Lock Air-to-Ground Missile (2)
desc: Multilock Air-to-Ground Missiles. Can engage and destroy up to two enemies with precision.

name: Multi-Lock Air-to-Ground Missile (4)
desc: Multilock Air-to-Ground Missiles. Can engage and destroy up to four enemies with precision.

name: Quick-Maneuver Advanced Semi-Active Air-to-Air Missile
desc: An advanced, highly-maneuverable semiactive missile with advanced lock-on-after-launch technology that allows for an ally to assist in designating a target.

name: Napalm Bomb
desc: Air-dropped flaming jelly designed to burn targets out.

name: PAARM
desc: Cheesy, Dangerous, Air-to-Air antiradiation missile.

name: Quick-Maneuver Air-to-Air Missile
desc: An advanced, highly manuverable aerial combat missile. Used in dogfighting, they allow for high angle off-boresight shots.

name: Quick-Maneuver Standard Missile
desc: Highly maneuverable standard missiles. Similar to QAAMs, but useful in more situations.

name: Rocket Pod
desc: Underwing rocket pods. Useful for strafing targets.

name: Semi-active Air-to-Air Missile
desc: Semi-Active Aerial Missile. Also known as Fox Ones, these missiles require a continual radar return from the aircraft to remain on target.

name: Short-range Aerial Suppression MIssile
desc: Short Range Aerial Suppression Missile. These missiles explode before hitting a target to suppress an area like a flak weapon instead.

name: Self-Forging Fragment Submunitions
desc: An advanced cluster munition.

name: Short-range High Impact Standard Missile
desc: High Impact Standard Missile; these missiles carry a stronger explosive payload than a normal standard missile.

name: Semi-Active Long Range Air-to-Air Missile
desc: A semi-active long-range air-to-air missile. Useful for taking out reinforcements or bomber fleets from afar.

name: Stand-Off Dispenser
desc: A long-ranged cruise weapon that employs a cluster munition over a target.

name: Short-range High Impact Burst Missile
desc: A short range missile with a large explosive payload.

name: Quick-maneuver Air-to-Air Missile, Early
desc: An early attempt at a highly manuverable aerial combat missile. Used in dogfighting, they allow for high angle off-boresight shots, but their early nature of the design limits their range.

name: Super Phoenix
desc: Super Phoenix. It's a Phoenix. But Cooler.

name: Tactical Laser System
desc: Pixy...

name: Unguided Bomb
desc: A so-called "dumb bomb". Extremely common.

name: Unguided Bomb, Triple Racks
desc: Triple racks of dumb bombs designed to be rippled-dropped on a target.

name: Unguided Bomb, Large
desc: A heavier dumb bomb, filled with more explosive mass.

name: Multi-Lock Air-to-Air Missile, High Velocity
desc: High-velocity mid-range multi-lock missiles designed to hit an enemy before they can react.

name: High-Velocity Standard Missile
desc: A high speed high payload modified Fox 2.

name: Wings of Steel
desc: When you make an attack with this Ordnance, use your Maneuverability stat instead of A2A or A2G. If you would suffer Disadvantage from Knife, you instead cannot employ this ordnance. This ordnance is added to the ordnance list of your currently piloted plane.

name: High-Velocity Standard Missile, Enhanced
desc: A high speed high payload modified Fox 2. Improved variant.

name: Semi-Active Long Range Air-to-Air Missile, Enhanced
desc: A semi-active long-range air-to-air missile. Useful for taking out reinforcements or bomber fleets from afar. This improved variant has a higher explosive warhead

name: Short-range Aerial Suppression MIssile, Enhanced
desc: Short Range Aerial Suppression Missile. These missiles explode before hitting a target to suppress an area like a flak weapon instead. Enhanced payload reduces damage penalty.

name: High-speed Anti-Radiation Missiles, Enhanced
desc: An early improvement to the anti-radiation missile focused solely on more speed. This version has an improved homing algorithm.

name: Multi-Lock Air-to-Ground Missile, High Velocity
desc: High-velocity mid-range air-to-ground multi-lock missiles designed to hit an enemy before they can react.

name: Multi-Lock High-Capacity Air-to-Air Missile
desc: A ripple-fire multilock air-to-air missile.
